title: AIML Insights
drivers: High surface temperatures in Delhi are primarily driven by distance from water and ghsl built-up density across built-up cores.

impact_estimates.cool_pavements: 8-14 C surface reduction in dense markets
impact_estimates.cool_roofs: 2-4 C indoor reduction, up to 12 C surface locally

recommendation: Deploy high albedo paint in Central Delhi and Karol Bagh first to capture up to 4.3 C average surface cooling.

model_metrics.validation: Spatial hold-out: train south Delhi, test north Delhi (ML-only model)
model_metrics.model_type: XGBoost (physics model disabled for real satellite data)
model_metrics.note: Metrics computed on real satellite LST. 5-fold spatial CV ML-only R²=0.318, RMSE=3.31°C. Physics model disabled as it was tuned on synthetic data.
